title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Honeywell India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Honeywell India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Honeywell India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Honeywell India:
Honeywell India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India!
